---
name: 🐛 Bug Report
about: Create a report to help us improve Wayfinder
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug
assignees: jakob-hendrix
---

### Description

A clear and concise description of what the bug is. (e.g., "Power Attack is not subtracting the correct amount from my Attack Roll at BAB +6").

### Expected vs. Actual

- **Expected Result:** (e.g., Total Attack should be +8)
- **Actual Result:** (e.g., Total Attack is +10)

### Reproduction Steps

1. Open character: [Character Name]
2. Go to [Tab/Screen Name]
3. Perform action: [e.g., Toggle Power Attack 'On']
4. See error: [e.g., Attack bonus stays at +10 instead of dropping to +8]

### Rule Reference

Please provide a link to the relevant rule on the **Archives of Nethys** or a page number from the **Core Rulebook**.

### Character Save File

> [!IMPORTANT] Please **attach your character save file** (if possible) to this issue that demonstrates this bug.

### Environment Info

- **OS:** [e.g. Windows 11, macOS Sonoma]
- **Wayfinder Version:** [e.g. v0.2.1]

### Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem.
